allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: 修复实战演练模块离线时所有API调用失败问题 *)
Bash(python -c "import subprocess; [subprocess.run\(['taskkill','/F','/PID',str\(p\)], capture_output=True\) for p in [78676, 98332]]; import time; time.sleep\(2\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('interpreter_v2.html', 'utf8'\); const match = html.match\(/const MATERIALS = \({[\\s\\S]*?}\\s*\);/\); if \(match\) { const m = eval\('\(' + match[1] + '\)'\); console.log\('MATERIALS easy:', m.easy.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS medium:', m.medium.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS hard:', m.hard.length\); } else { console.log\('MATERIALS not found'\); } const match2 = html.match\(/const MATERIALS_REVERSE = \({[\\s\\S]*?}\\s*\);/\); if \(match2\) { const mr = eval\('\(' + match2[1] + '\)'\); console.log\('MATERIALS_REVERSE easy:', mr.easy.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS_REVERSE medium:', mr.medium.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS_REVERSE hard:', mr.hard.length\); } else { console.log\('MATERIALS_REVERSE not found'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const lines = fs.readFileSync\('interpreter_v2.html', 'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); const l = lines[640]; for\(let i = 0; i < l.length; i++\) { const c = l.charCodeAt\(i\); if\(c > 127\) console.log\('pos', i, 'char:', l[i], 'code:', c.toString\(16\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const lines = fs.readFileSync\('interpreter_v2.html', 'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); const l = lines[640]; console.log\('pos 33 code:', l.charCodeAt\(33\).toString\(16\), 'char:', JSON.stringify\(l[33]\)\); console.log\('pos 38 code:', l.charCodeAt\(38\).toString\(16\), 'char:', JSON.stringify\(l[38]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('interpreter_v2.html', 'utf8'\); const match = html.match\(/const MATERIALS = \({[\\s\\S]*?}\\s*\);/\); if \(match\) { const m = eval\('\(' + match[1] + '\)'\); console.log\('MATERIALS easy:', m.easy.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS medium:', m.medium.length\); console.log\('MATERIALS hard:', m.hard.length\); } const match2 = html.match\(/const MATERIALS_REVERSE = \({[\\s\\S]*?}\\s*\);/\); if \(match2\) { const mr = eval\('\(' + match2[1] + '\)'\); console.log\('REVERSE easy:', mr.easy.length\); console.log\('REVERSE medium:', mr.medium.length\); console.log\('REVERSE hard:', mr.hard.length\); }")
